Cabo Verde • West Africa

Sal Island

Reliable winter sun, beaches, and water sports.

4.5 564 reviews · Cabo Verde · From $22
Image slot Attraction Sal Island
Image slot Country Cabo Verde
Image slot Region West Africa

Where

Cabo Verde

Region

West Africa

Traveler rating

4.5 / 5

Typical cost

From $22

About this attraction

Sal works well for travelers who want a simple Atlantic island break with dependable resort logistics and a wide range of packaged travel options.

Highlights

  • Clear sense of why this place matters in the wider destination
  • Nearby accommodation and dining ideas to make planning easier
  • Practical access, timing, and route notes before booking
  • External partner paths for checking live options and availability

How to get there

International flights arrive directly into Sal, making transfers to the hotel zone simple.

Best time to visit

November to June is the strongest period for dry sunshine and wind sports.

Practical information

Before booking, check the time commitment, access route, permit or guide needs, season, nearby accommodation, dining rhythm, and whether the experience fits the pace of your wider trip.

Full description

Sal works well for travelers who want a simple Atlantic island break with dependable resort logistics and a wide range of packaged travel options. Use this listing to decide whether the attraction deserves space in your itinerary: compare the experience, access, best timing, nearby stays, dining options, and partner booking paths before you move forward.

Nearby dining

Restaurants near Sal Island

Image slot Restaurant Barracuda Restaurant Sal

Cabo Verdean seafood

Barracuda Restaurant

Santa Maria has a real independent dining scene, and Barracuda fits travelers who want seafood outside the resort buffet rhythm.

★ 4.3 (421) $$
Grilled tuna, lobster, cachupa, and beach-town seafood
